function.content:
---
record_type: invoice
invoice_number: INV-0002
alias: northstar_backfill_beta
issued_on: 2025-11-25
total_eur: 770
counterparty: Nordstern Finanzsoftware GmbH
project: Northstar Ledger
related_entity: Nina Schreiber
lines:
  - item: operator workflow discovery sprint
    quantity: 1
    unit_eur: 185
    line_eur: 185
  - item: follow-up timeline prototype review
    quantity: 2
    unit_eur: 240
    line_eur: 480
  - item: buyer-language refinement memo
    quantity: 1
    unit_eur: 105
    line_eur: 105
---
# Northstar workflow review invoice

```text
+----------------+-------------------------------+
| field          | value                         |
+----------------+-------------------------------+
| record_type    | invoice                       |
| invoice_number | INV-0002                      |
| alias          | northstar_backfill_beta       |
| issued_on      | 2025-11-25                    |
| total_eur      | 770                           |
| counterparty   | Nordstern Finanzsoftware GmbH |
| project        | Northstar Ledger              |
| related_entity | Nina Schreiber                |
+----------------+-------------------------------+
```

## Line Items

```text
+---+-------------------------------------+-----+----------+----------+
| # | item                                | qty | unit_eur | line_eur |
+---+-------------------------------------+-----+----------+----------+
| 1 | operator workflow discovery sprint  | 1   | 185      | 185      |
| 2 | follow-up timeline prototype review | 2   | 240      | 480      |
| 3 | buyer-language refinement memo      | 1   | 105      | 105      |
+---+-------------------------------------+-----+----------+----------+
|   | TOTAL                               |     |          | 770      |
+---+-------------------------------------+-----+----------+----------+
```

## Notes

A slightly later invoice where the prototype review started taking more of the effort mix.

next_step.current_state: Invoice migration write succeeded. Reactive outbox check is not applicable since no outbox email was written. Next complete inbox workflow by deleting processed inbox file.
next_step.observation: Structured frontmatter was written to the target invoice file without errors.

next_step.current_state: Task completed: workflow docs read, invoice migrated with schema-compliant frontmatter preserving body, inbox item deleted.

function.message: Completed the next inbox request by OCR-structuring `50_finance/invoices/2025_11_25__eur_000770__inv_0002__northstar_backfill_beta.md` into YAML frontmatter per finance schema, preserving the original note body verbatim below frontmatter, then removed the processed inbox file.
function.rulebook_notes: Followed mandatory bootstrap (tree/read AGENTS/context), read relevant workflow and schema docs before task work, preserved original body under frontmatter, kept diff focused, and deleted inbox item after full completion per inbox workflow.
function.outcome_justification: The inbox request explicitly asked to OCR and add YAML frontmatter to the specified invoice. The target file contained all required invoice schema fields and line items visibly, enabling exact extraction without guessing. File was updated accordingly and inbox item was deleted as required after successful completion.
